stemHtml: Flugprop 565 at FL180 heading south over RODRI with Brussels Control. Fire develops — descending to FL70, diverting to Charleroi. What is the correct distress call?

options.a: Mayday x3, Brussels Control, turning right to Charleroi due to fire, descending FL70.
options.b: Mayday x3, Brussels Control, Flugprop 565, fire on board, diverting to Charleroi, position RODRI FL180, descending FL70, heading south.
options.c: Mayday x3, Brussels Control, Flugprop 565, passing RODRI, fire on board, descending FL70, diverting Charleroi.
options.d: Brussels Control, Flugprop 565, Mayday x3, descending FL70, turning to Charleroi.
